title: Simple Indicator Coordinates (NeoForge/Forge)
description: A simple mod that adds one simple piece of information to the player, namely coordinates.
body:
A simple and useful mod that frees you from constantly pressing F3. SimpleIndicatorCoordinates displays your current coordinates (X, Y, Z) in real time right in the corner of the screen.

What does this mod do?

Displays coordinates: Clearly displays your current position in the world (X, Y, Z).

Automatic operation: Starts working immediately after installation, requiring no additional in-game actions.

Minimalism: It performs one task—displaying coordinates—and does it well, without cluttering the interface.
